title: tithymalus × gibellianus
intro: Tithymalus × gibellianus, also known as Euphorbia x gibelliana, is a hybrid plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, derived from the cross between Euphorbia characias and Euphorbia x martinii. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to its high concentration of diterpene esters. The health benefits of Tithymalus × gibellianus include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or ointments, allowing for various methods of topical and internal use.
